case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. CHARLOTTE COLOYAN DELA CRUZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200016663) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR APR-05-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE DEC-01-2020 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-05-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
